title: fragaria × ananassa
intro: Fragaria × ananassa, also known as the strawberry plant, is a hybrid species of the Fragaria genus that is commonly cultivated for its edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Fragaria × ananassa include its high antioxidant content and its ability to reduce inflammation, which makes it useful in treating various health conditions such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. The health benefits of consuming Fragaria × ananassa include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Fragaria × ananassa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
